scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -a --exclude='dist' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.gsd' --exclude='.agent' --exclude='.claude' --exclude='.gemini' --exclude='.DS_Store' --exclude='server' --exclude='README.md' --exclude='TELEGRAM_SETUP.md' --exclude='THREEJS_GUIDE.md' --exclude='package.json' --exclude='package-lock.json' . dist/
